attractions.name: Historic District
attractions.summary: Historic District is one of the more recognizable history-focused stops in Savannah for visitors building a first trip around the city's core landmarks.
attractions.heroTitle: Historic District guide, things to do, and local tours
attractions.heroSummary: Planning guide for Historic District in Savannah, with visitor basics and helpful local experiences.
thingsToDo: Use Historic District as a stop for a more history-focused city walk or half-day plan.
planningTips: Plan Historic District as part of a wider neighborhood or city block instead of making it the only stop in that part of the day.
A guided walk or city tour often gives Historic District more value than a quick standalone pass-through.

experienceIntents.description: A simple starting point for visitors who want more context around Historic District.

attractions.name: Forsyth Park
attractions.summary: Forsyth Park gives visitors a practical outdoor counterweight to busier city blocks and works well as part of a broader Savannah day plan.
attractions.heroTitle: Forsyth Park guide, things to do, and local tours
attractions.heroSummary: Planning guide for Forsyth Park in Savannah, with visitor basics and helpful local experiences.
thingsToDo: Use Forsyth Park as a slower outdoor break between denser city attractions or tours.
planningTips: Plan Forsyth Park as part of a wider neighborhood or city block instead of making it the only stop in that part of the day.
Outdoor stops usually work best when you pair them with one or two nearby indoor attractions instead of stacking too many transit-heavy moves.
